methods.name: spaceone.core.unittest.result.RichTestResult._prepare_callback
documentation:
Appends a `infoclass` to the given target list and sets a callback
method to be called by stopTest method.

A test result class that can express test results in a XML report.

Used by XMLTestRunner.

classes.name: spaceone.core.scheduler.scheduler.HourlyScheduler
documentation:
HourlyScheduler starts every HH:00
If you want to start at different minutes
send minute like ':15' meaning every 15 minute

methods.name: spaceone.core.token.Consul.__init__

Args:
  - config: connection parameter

Example:
    config = {
            'host': 'consul.example.com',
            'port': 8500
        }

methods.name: spaceone.core.token.Consul._validate_config
documentation:
Parameter for Consul
- host, port=8500, token=None, scheme=http, consistency=default, dc=None, verify=True, cert=None

methods.name: spaceone.core.handler.authentication_handler.SpaceONEAuthenticationHandler._update_meta
documentation:
Args:
    token_info(dict): {
        'iss': 'str',   # issuer (spaceone.identity)
        'rol': 'str',   # role type
        'typ': 'str',   # token type (ACCESS_TOKEN | REFRESH_TOKEN | CLIENT_SECRET)
        'own': 'str',   # owner (USER | APP)
        'did': 'str',   # domain_id
        'wid': 'str',   # workspace_id, Optional
        'aud': 'str',   # audience (user_id | app_id)
        'exp': 'int',   # expiration time
        'iat': 'int',   # issued at
        'jti': 'str',   # jwt id (token_key | client_id), Optional
        'permissions': 'list',  # permissions, Optional
        'projects': 'list',     # project_ids, if workspace member, Optional
        'injected_params': 'dict',  # injected parameters, override parameters, Optional
        'ver': 'str',   # jwt version

methods.name: spaceone.core.handler.authentication_handler.SpaceONEAuthenticationHandler._update_system_meta
documentation:
Args:
    token_info(dict): {
        'iss': 'str',   # issuer (spaceone.identity)
        'typ': 'str',   # token type (SYSTEM_TOKEN)
        'own': 'str',   # owner (SYSTEM)
        'did': 'str',   # domain_id (domain-root)
        'aud': 'str',   # audience (root_domain_user_id)
        'iat': 'int',   # issued at
        'jti': 'str',   # jwt id
        'ver': 'str',   # jwt version
